name: daveremy-plugins
description: Aggregated marketplace for daveremy Claude Code plugins

plugins.name: function-health-mcp
plugins.description: Query Function Health lab results, track biomarker changes, and get health recommendations

plugins.name: apple-health-mcp
plugins.description: Query Apple Health daily metrics, workouts, and trends via Health Auto Export CSVs

plugins.name: hevy-mcp
plugins.description: MCP server for the Hevy fitness tracking API — workouts, routines, exercises, and more

plugins.name: oura-mcp
plugins.description: Oura Ring MCP server — sleep, readiness, activity, HR, stress, SpO2, workouts, and sessions

plugins.name: nutrition-mcp
plugins.description: 3-tier nutrition lookup with local SQLite caching — search 326K+ foods, USDA API fallback, barcode scanning
